news.t: SS&C ALPS Advisors Adds Active Large-Cap ETF to the Lineup

holdings.infoBox: LGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 6.65%, Microsoft at 6.12%, Cash Equivalent at 5.21%, Alphabet at 5.04%, and Amazon.com at 4.65%.

overview.description: The Level Four Large Cap Growth Active ETF (LGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US large cap stocks. Holdings are managed based on quantitative analysis and fundamental research, selecting those companies perceived to have favorable growth potential within their market sector. LGRO was launched on Aug 22, 2023 and is issued by SS&C.

data.title: SS&C ALPS Advisors Adds Active Large-Cap ETF to the Lineup
data.text: The Fund can allocate to companies or sectors in response to changing economic or market conditions DENVER , Aug. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- SS&C ALPS Advisors, a wholly-owned subsidiary of SS&C Technol...
